features.name: always block with posedge clk and negedge async reset sensitivity
features.description: Code should include an always block with dual-edge sensitivity (posedge clk and negedge async reset) containing a multi-branch if-else chain for async reset, sync reset, and data assignment

features.name: async reset signal tied to constant via module port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the async reset port is connected to a constant value 1'b1, effectively disabling the async reset path

features.name: reg with combined async and sync reset inference pattern
features.description: Code should include a reg declared inside a module with both async reset (via sensitivity list edge) and sync reset (via conditional branch) that exercises flip-flop type inference
